BP this week
💓
Your BP trend for the last 7 days. Green zone is your target range.
Blood pressure · last 7 days
Systolic   Diastolic   Normal range
What does this mean?
Normal Systolic <120 · Diastolic <80
Elevated Systolic 120–129 · Diastolic <80
Stage 1 High Systolic 130–139 · OR Diastolic 80–89
Stage 2 High Systolic ≥140 · OR Diastolic ≥90
You take Irbesartan HCTZ, Metoprolol, and Amlodipine — your target may differ. Always discuss readings with your doctor.
💊 Medication compliance · this week
Loading...
💧 Water intake · this week
Goal: 10 glasses/day · Zepbound + HCTZ diuretic increases fluid needs
💧 Body water % · this week
Healthy range for women: 45–60% · Estimated from Withings scale data
❤️ Resting HR · last 7 days
Normal resting HR: 60–100 bpm · lower is often better for cardiovascular health
Respiratory rate · breaths/min
Normal range: 12–20 breaths/min
🩺 BP vs Sleep quality · last 7 days
High BP days often coincide with poor sleep — look for the pattern.
Systolic Diastolic Sleep hours (right axis) Quality (relative)

Wellness · Your journey
🌿
Your health story goes back to 2019. Hip issues, recovery, and now a full transformation. This is your data telling that story.
Key milestones
2019–2022
Hip pain begins, activity decreases, weight climbs
Oct 2023
Total right hip replacement — beginning of recovery
Oct 13, 2025
Labs: Cholesterol 132, ALT 42 ⚠, Glucose 96
Oct 25, 2025
Started Zepbound at 201.4 lbs — the turning point
Feb 11, 2026
Labs: Cholesterol 116 ✓, ALT 25 ✓, Glucose 88 ✓
May 19, 2026
All-time low: 168.7 lbs — 32.7 lbs lost
Lab trends over time
Next labs: ~Aug–Nov 2026 · Values from MyChart & Athena Health

Settings
Profile
Personal info

App Setup
Data & Sync
📅 Daily routine
1. Export Apple Health from iPhone before 7:30 AM
   Health app → Profile photo → Export All Health Data
2. Cron runs at 7:30 AM → Python script → CSV → uploads automatically
3. Open Glow — data is current ✅
⚡ Manual upload
Run in Terminal anytime after exporting:
bash ~/glow_auto_upload.sh
🔄 Rebuild full history
Use if weight journey chart is missing older data. Run once in Terminal:
python3 glow_health_export.py --reseed Run from: OneDrive / 08 App Projects / Glow Dashboard / Health Data
🔍 Check logs
cat ~/Library/Logs/glow_auto_upload.log
📂 Upload CSV manually
Run your Python script, then upload here to refresh charts and AI coach data.
Last upload: checking...
Daily Reset Schedule
Daily data resets at 3:00 AM local time — so late-night logging still counts for the previous day.
💊 Meds & supplementsResets at 3 AM
💧 Water intakeResets at 3 AM
☀️ AM Skincare RoutineResets at 3 AM
🌙 PM Skincare RoutineResets at 3 AM
😴 Sleep & CPAPResets at 3 AM
🏋️ Exercise check-inResets at 3 AM
🌙 Evening Core RestoreResets at 3 AM
👗 Outfit nudgeResets at 3 AM
⚖️ AM Data Setup checksResets at 3 AM
🧠 How are you feeling?Holds until updated
💉 Zepbound doseHolds until next injection
📍 Injection siteHolds until "Ready" checked
Reminders & Notifications
Daily reminders
Coming soon
Weekly reminders
A bottom-sheet popup appears every Saturday and Sunday reminding you to complete your weekly review. "Got it →" means you saw it — not that you finished everything. Each day fires independently and resets every week.
Recalculate Glow Score
Today → Glow Score → Recalculate
Review weekly progress
Tap each pillar → Weekly tab
Log any missed workouts
Body → Exercise log
Hair & skin scan
Hair → AI analysis · Skin → Scan
Weekly mind reflection
Mind → Weekly tab → Weekly insight
Set weekly intention word
Mind → Weekly tab → Intention word
🗓 Fires Saturday and Sunday independently
✓ Saturday dismissal doesn't prevent Sunday popup
↺ Resets automatically each new week
⏱ 2.5 s delay on app open — skips the very first load
Check-in reminders
Coming soon
Coach Nudges
A gentle amber nudge appears on each coach card when it hasn't been used in a while. On/off controls coming soon.
